notes: Polish + fixes from live play. The Blocker shield's glow now hugs the icon (no more big square) and sits on the center-facing side of the board for both players. Attached DON!! group neatly within a character's width and spread out to fit when the character is rested. Field cards and their attached DON!! now render above the board zones. End-of-match 'View Board' now reveals BOTH players' remaining hand and Life. The AI now pauses before it counters, so the counter reads as a clear action instead of the power snapping up instantly. Bug fixes: the AI's card search no longer briefly flashes its cards to you; a rested character returned to hand now sits upright; and the Luffy & Ace Leader no longer wrongly gives ITSELF +3000 on the opponent's turn (that buff is for your Ace/Luffy Characters, not the Leader).
